title: Trace Config
description: Trace Config v1 contract for SKU traceability, QR registry readiness, public trace policy, and recall readiness.
$comment: Sources: PACK-01 traceability chain and PACK-02 Trace Config requirement. TODO: exact public trace payload policy will be generated in later phases.

raw_lot_trace_required.description: Whether raw material lot trace is required.

public_trace_allowed.description: Whether public trace is allowed after internal trace readiness.

public_trace_exclusions.description: Internal data categories excluded from public trace.
